formula: GA20OX = max(PIF4_5_7, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(Gibberellin * ABA, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
DELLA = max(SPY, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(GID1 * SLY1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
BZR_BES = max(PP2A, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(DELLA * BIN2 * MAX2, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
PIF4_5_7 = max(Temperature, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(PHYB * HFR1 * PAR1 * DELLA * EC, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FLC = max(FRI, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(VIN3 * AUT_SYN * PRC2 * lncCOOLAIR * LDL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FT = (max(GI, 0.01) * max(CO, 0.01) * max(T6P, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(FLC * AP2_TOE * SVP * FLM, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
CO = (max(FKF1, 0.01) * max(PHYA, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(PHYB * ZTL * CDF1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Plant_Height = (max(BZR_BES, 0.01) * max(ARF6_7_8, 0.01) * max(ARR1, 0.01) * max(PIF4_5_7, 0.01) * max(Strigolactone, 0.01))^(1/5) * min(1/max(SPL9 * DELLA * EIN3 * ABI5 * FLOWER_INT * HY5, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
